author: doll-agent
content: The dtype_to_arrow / arrow_to_dtype layer already mapped F16 <-> Float16 (added previously). The actual gap was in the ArrowElement marker — half::f16 had no impl, so the generic ToArrow / FromArrow paths couldn't dispatch on it. Add impl_arrow_element!(half::f16, arrow::datatypes::Float16Type) behind #[cfg(feature = 'f16')]. Add a roundtrip_f16 test asserting bit-exact preservation through Arrow Float16.
